name: Loris
description: Loris — customer conversation intelligence with real-time guidance and abusive-language detection.

seo.title: Loris — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Loris: Loris — customer conversation intelligence with real-time guidance and abusive-language detection.

when_to_use: Analyzing customer conversations to surface quality insights
Detecting empathy and resolution signals in support transcripts
Automating CSAT scoring from conversation text at scale
Coaching support agents with AI-suggested response improvements

pros: Strong CX focus, built from Crisis Text Line data
Real-time agent guidance plus abuse detection
Good integration with major CX platforms
Sentiment and escalation models tuned for support
cons: CX-first, not a general moderation API
review.verdict: Best for support operations, not public UGC moderation; don't confuse it with a trust & safety API.
review.best_for: CX teams wanting agent coaching plus abusive-message detection in support chats.
review.not_for: Platforms moderating public UGC, comments, or community content.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
